Name: UStereoLayerComponent
Description: A geometry layer within the stereo rendered viewport.

Variables.Name: bLiveTexture
Variables.Description: True if the stereo layer texture needs to update itself every frame(scene capture, video, etc.)

Variables.Name: bSupportsDepth
Variables.Description: True if the stereo layer needs to support depth intersections with the scene geometry, if available on the platform

Variables.Name: bNoAlphaChannel
Variables.Description: True if the texture should not use its own alpha channel (1.0 will be substituted)

Variables.Name: Texture
Variables.Description: Texture displayed on the stereo layer (is stereocopic textures are supported on the platfrom and more than one texture is provided, this will be the right eye)

Variables.Name: LeftTexture
Variables.Description: Texture displayed on the stereo layer for left eye, if stereoscopic textures are supported on the platform

Variables.Name: bQuadPreserveTextureRatio
Variables.Description: True if the quad should internally set it's Y value based on the set texture's dimensions

Variables.Name: QuadSize
Variables.Description: Size of the rendered stereo layer quad

Variables.Name: UVRect
Variables.Description: UV coordinates mapped to the quad face

Variables.Name: CylinderRadius
Variables.Description: Radial size of the rendered stereo layer cylinder

Variables.Name: CylinderOverlayArc
Variables.Description: Arc angle for the stereo layer cylinder

Variables.Name: CylinderHeight
Variables.Description: Height of the stereo layer cylinder

Variables.Name: StereoLayerType
Variables.Description: Specifies how and where the quad is rendered to the screen

Variables.Name: StereoLayerShape
Variables.Description: Specifies which type of layer it is.  Note that some shapes will be supported only on certain platforms!

Variables.Name: Priority
Variables.Description: Render priority among all stereo layers, higher priority render on top of lower priority

Functions.Name: SetTexture
Functions.Description: Change the texture displayed on the stereo layer quad

Functions.Name: SetQuadSize
Functions.Description: Change the quad size. This is the unscaled height and width, before component scale is applied.

Functions.Name: SetUVRect
Functions.Description: Change the UV coordinates mapped to the quad face

Functions.Name: SetPriority
Functions.Description: Change the layer's render priority, higher priorities render on top of lower priorities
